metadata.name: Information Exchange Workflow
metadata.description: Full information exchange workflow reflecting the ISO 19650 draft, covering all CDE states from Work in Progress through to Published and Archived, including the appointed party check and review gate, lead appointed party authorization, appointing party acceptance, and rejection return paths.
metadata.author: ISO19650 Knowledge Maps

nodes.label: WORK IN PROGRESS
nodes.description: State where information is being developed by the authoring appointed party and is not accessible to other parties.

nodes.label: Check / Review / Approve
nodes.description: Quality assurance check and technical review performed by the appointed party before information is shared.

nodes.label: SHARED
nodes.description: State where information is shared with other parties for coordination and collaborative development.

nodes.label: Review / Authorize
nodes.description: Review of the information model by the lead appointed party and authorization of its approved use prior to submission.

nodes.label: SUBMITTED
nodes.description: State where information has been authorized by the lead appointed party and submitted to the appointing party for acceptance.

nodes.label: Review / Accept
nodes.description: Review of the submitted information model by the appointing party and acceptance of its approved use.

nodes.label: PUBLISHED
nodes.description: State where information has been accepted by the appointing party and is authorized for use.

nodes.label: ARCHIVED
nodes.description: State where superseded published information is retained for audit and historical reference.

nodes.label: Appointed Party
nodes.description: Organization responsible for generating information containers and performing quality assurance checks and approval.

nodes.label: Lead Appointed Party
nodes.description: Organization responsible for coordinating information production and authorizing information models prior to submission.

nodes.label: Appointing Party
nodes.description: Organization responsible for reviewing and accepting submitted information models.

evidence.quote: Before information is shared it shall be checked, reviewed and approved.
Each appointed party shall undertake a quality assurance check and then review and approve the information container.
Following checking and approval the information container is shared with other parties.
Shared information is reviewed and authorized before submission.
The lead appointed party shall review and authorize the information model.
Authorized information is submitted to the appointing party.
Submitted information is reviewed and accepted by the appointing party.
The appointing party shall undertake a review of the information model and accept the information container(s).
If the information model is rejected it shall be amended and resubmitted.
Information containers may be returned to work in progress if amendments are required following checking or review.
Superseded information is retained as archived information.
